name: mofa-eval
author: ashum9
description: Agent response evaluation skill using an LLM-as-a-judge approach to automatically score and track output quality over time.

tools.name: evaluate_response
tools.description: Scores a single agent response against an expected output using a specific evaluation rubric.

run_id.description: A unique identifier grouping multiple evaluations into a single run.

expected.description: The expected ideal output or ground-truth.

actual.description: The actual text response generated by the agent.

rubric.description: The name of the TOML rubric to use (e.g. 'helpfulness', 'coding_accuracy').

tools.name: batch_eval
tools.description: Evaluates a batch of test cases provided via a JSON array payload.

run_id.description: The unique identifier for this evaluation run test suite.

test_suite_json.description: A JSON string array of objects containing 'expected', 'actual', and 'rubric' keys.

tools.name: score_summary
tools.description: Returns an aggregated performance report for a specific run.

run_id.description: The unique run UUID to summarize.

tools.name: compare_runs
tools.description: Compares two different run IDs and outputs the difference in evaluation scores (regression testing).

run_b.description: The new run UUID to compare against the baseline.
